notes: REAL fix found. The diagnostic showed white-space: nowrap on the TH despite our rule saying 'normal'. Source: the legacy '.budget-grid th.row-label, .budget-grid tbody th { white-space: nowrap }' rule (line 831) was applying — the projection table has BOTH .proj-table AND .budget-grid classes. Same-specificity but defined LATER in source so it won. Fixed by removing white-space:nowrap from legacy rule + adding !important on the .proj-table tbody th wrap properties as belt-and-suspenders. Word-break: break-word + overflow-wrap: anywhere will now actually trigger because nowrap is no longer blocking them.
